quoteFirst: Three officers immediately set off for Chiselhurst, and Mr. Cooper arrived with all possible despatch at Camden Place, but was too late; the wound was mortal, and Mrs. Bonar expired at
quoteLast: o'clock, having been through the whole previous time insensible, and having only once uttered the exclamation of "Oh dear!"
